title: Teladoc Health Q4 2023 Earnings Summary
text: Teladoc Health Q4 2023 Earnings Summary. Financial Results - Q4 consolidated revenue grew 4% year-over-year to $661 million. Full-year 2023 revenue reached $2.6 billion, up 8%. Consolidated adjusted EBITDA grew 33% to $328 million for full year. Free cash flow improved dramatically to $193.7 million from $16.5 million prior year. Segment Performance - Integrated Care revenue increased 8% to $384 million in Q4 with adjusted EBITDA growing 28%. Chronic care enrollment grew 14% year-over-year to 1.16 million members. BetterHelp Q4 revenue $276 million (flat year-over-year) with adjusted EBITDA growing 11% despite margin pressures from lower marketing spend yields. 2024 Guidance - Revenue guidance $2.635-$2.735 billion (1.5%-5% growth). Adjusted EBITDA $350-$390 million (6.7%-18.9% growth). Free cash flow $210-$204 million. Cost Efficiency Program: $85 million in annual operating expense savings identified, with $35 million benefiting 2024 adjusted EBITDA.
